<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Undeploy from Inference Engine"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/engines/{engine_id}/undeploy"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Undeploy the deployment from the Inference Engine

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"engine_id","in":"path","required":true,"description":"The ID of the Inference Engine","schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"deployment_id":{"type":"string","example":"dp-12345"}},"required":["deployment_id"]}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"204":{"description":"Undeployed Successfully"},"400":{"description":"Invalid Input error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["status","error"],"properties":{"status":{"type":"integer","format":"int32","example":400},"error":{"type":"string","example":"Bad request"}},"title":"ApiErrorInvalidInput"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["status","error"],"properties":{"status":{"type":"integer","format":"int32","example":401},"error":{"type":"string","example":"Unauthorized"}},"title":"ApiErrorUnauthorized"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
